name: ai-program-management-n8n
description: AI-powered autonomous program management system built on n8n — multi-agent orchestration using GPT-4o, Jira, Google Drive, Airtable, and Slack.

_comments.runtime: n8n manages its own internal dependency tree. All node packages listed below under n8n-node-types are bundled with n8n and do not require separate installation. They are listed here for documentation and version-pinning reference only.
_comments.code-nodes: The Code nodes in this project use only Node.js built-in modules (crypto). No external npm packages are required inside Code nodes.
_comments.crypto: crypto is a Node.js built-in module — available natively in n8n's sandboxed Code node environment. No installation required.

n8n-node-types.comment: All nodes used are part of n8n-nodes-base — bundled with n8n core. No community nodes required.

used-by: Program Management Workflow / Orchestrator OpenAI API call → gpt-4o
Status Agent / Program Status Analysis OpenAI API call → gpt-4o-mini
Risk Agent / Risk Detection OpenAI API Call → gpt-4o
Comms Agent / Meeting Analysis OpenAI API Call → gpt-4o-mini
Reporting Agent / Reporting Agent OpenAI Call → gpt-4o
Status Agent — GET open sprint issues
Risk Agent — GET issues, POST create risk ticket
Comms Agent — GET issues, POST create task ticket
Program Management Workflow — read Projects table
Risk Agent — read Dependency Mapping table
Comms Agent — search and download meeting notes (.txt)
Reporting Agent — create exec brief document
Slack Approval Handler — send approved brief to exec recipient
Program Management Workflow — post brief to exec channel
Slack Approval Handler — post approval confirmation and edit notifications
